en.text: of a person born to a destiny
and they ascribe faults to the good qualities of the saintly persons
Their minds full of many vain thoughts
and everything is born of male and female union
of the godly and virtuous qualities
full of vanity, pride, and arrogance
conceit (on account of one’s knowledge, wealth, or high birth)
for the fulfillment of their desires
The reason for existence is lust alone
enjoyment of desires is the ultimate
caught in the net of illusion
into the cycle of birth and death
They, the persons of demoniac nature
acts according to his own desires
in the wombs of the demoniac
within their own and others’ bodies
by the snares of hundreds of wishes

ru.text: не в соответствии с наставлениями писаний
